Travel
What to do Segments What’s trending Leaders Careers
What to do Segments What’s trending Leaders Careers

Travel consulting

The travel industry is no stranger to disruption. And in the post-pandemic world, travel companies must continuously reinvent to outwit unforeseen circumstances, while providing cohesive, elevated experiences for customers.

Travel now

78%

of consumers plan to travel for leisure in the next 12 months

45%

of travelers find their travel experiences unauthentic

100%

of travel executives interviewed agree that technology plays a critical role in all current and future reinvention strategies

35%

of travel companies state that legacy technology is the main barrier in delivering their reinvention strategy

How to reinvent travel

Close
TRAVELER EXPERIENCE

Travel is personal. Meet consumer demands with relevant experiences

74%
of consumers have abandoned purchases due to overwhelming complexity and too many options.
Changing customer expectations paired with increased demand impact your ability to deliver seamless experiences. Gen AI and automation present a significant opportunity to elevate the travel experience.
Learn more
TRAVELER EXPERIENCE

Travel is personal. Meet consumer demands with relevant experiences

Changing customer expectations paired with increased demand impact your ability to deliver seamless experiences. Gen AI and automation present a significant opportunity to elevate the travel experience.
74%
of consumers have abandoned purchases due to overwhelming complexity and too many options.
Learn more
Close
Technology Transformation

How to prepare your people for new tech innovations

35% of travel companies say legacy tech is holding them back. Embrace transformative solutions to drive faster change. Learn how to modernize, boost agility and innovate with a strong digital core.
Learn more
Technology Transformation

How to prepare your people for new tech innovations

35% of travel companies say legacy tech is holding them back. Embrace transformative solutions to drive faster change. Learn how to modernize, boost agility and innovate with a strong digital core.
Learn more
Close
Data-led travel operations

Enhance performance, reduce costs and increase real-time decision making

With just 6% of travel companies feeling future-ready, those leveraging data and insights will lead the way. Uncover how automation can enhance your revenue and decision-making today.
Learn more
Data-led travel operations

Enhance performance, reduce costs and increase real-time decision making

With just 6% of travel companies feeling future-ready, those leveraging data and insights will lead the way. Uncover how automation can enhance your revenue and decision-making today.
Learn more
Close
Sustainable travel strategy

Define your pathway to sustainability

With 59% of consumers prioritizing sustainability, it’s crucial to act now. Responsible travel practices attract customers, investors and talent. Discover how sustainability fuels growth.
Learn more
Sustainable travel strategy

Define your pathway to sustainability

With 59% of consumers prioritizing sustainability, it’s crucial to act now. Responsible travel practices attract customers, investors and talent. Discover how sustainability fuels growth.
Learn more
Close
Talent transformation and skilling

Cultivate the skills needed to deliver world-class traveler experiences

As technology evolves, so does the need for skilled personnel. Addressing the current skills gap, investing in training and development play a vital role in enriching the industry’s talent pool.
Learn more
Talent transformation and skilling

Cultivate the skills needed to deliver world-class traveler experiences

As technology evolves, so does the need for skilled personnel. Addressing the current skills gap, investing in training and development play a vital role in enriching the industry’s talent pool.
Learn more
Close
Recovery strategy & sustainable growth

Build a growth strategy that creates revenue streams fit for future growth

Travel companies need new revenue streams to counter pressures and grow sustainably with loyalty programs and partnerships. It’s time to embrace modern traveler needs and collaborate across industries.
Learn more
Recovery strategy & sustainable growth

Build a growth strategy that creates revenue streams fit for future growth

Travel companies need new revenue streams to counter pressures and grow sustainably with loyalty programs and partnerships. It’s time to embrace modern traveler needs and collaborate across industries.
Learn more

Segments we support

  • Aviation companies
    Aviation companies

    Aviation companies

    Discover new operational efficiencies for airlines and airports that streamline the traveler experience.

  • Hospitality companies
    Hospitality companies

    Hospitality companies

    Tap into data-driven insights with industry expertise that drives growth and propels you ahead of the competition.

What’s trending in travel

View all work
Research Report
Holiday shopping 2025: Tis the season for smarter spending and renewed confidence

Holiday shoppers, facing decision stress and high prices, are seeking value combined with experience, convenience and connection. Many are turning to Gen AI for inspiration, product comparisons and smarter shortlists.

Expand
Announcement
Accenture and Qatar Airways Launch “AI Skyways” to Transform Aviation

Accenture and Qatar Airways unveil “AI Skyways,” a strategic AI partnership to boost travel personalization, optimize operations, elevate customer experience, and drive sustainability in aviation.

Expand
Announcement
Accenture and Google Cloud Support Air France-KLM

Accenture and Google Cloud are collaborating with Air France-KLM  to establish a cutting-edge generative AI (gen AI) factory.

Expand
Research Report
How to win hearts, minds—and algorithms

AI is evolving from a useful tool to a trusted guide, loyal companion and second self. Building resilient relationships between consumers, brands and AI in times of uncertainty is essential to remain seen and relevant.

Expand
Research Report
The travel industry’s new trip

Reinvent the travel experience with AI. From inspiration to planning and booking, generative AI simplifies the process for both travelers and businesses.

Expand
Perspective
Navigating the new tariff landscape and its economic impact

U.S. tariffs have introduced unprecedented uncertainty for executives to adapt to. In this perspective, we outline four pillars of resilience that enable enterprise resilience and how they can help you navigate the new tariff landscape.

Expand
Research Report
In the retail-led future of airlines, the sky’s the limit

Airlines can unlock billions in trapped value by modernizing offer, order, settle and deliver systems. This transition is complex and requires a holistic long-term view to unlock value.

Expand
Research Report
Charting aviation’s path to reinvention

The aviation industry is undergoing transformation. Companies can accelerate their reinvention by focusing to navigate 4 key challenges that will shape the trajectory of aviation in the coming years.

Expand
